headline: Zoetis, Insmed, And HubSpot Are Among Top 10 Large-Cap Losers Last Week (May 4-May 8): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
summary: Weak earnings, soft guidance and analyst target cuts triggered sharp selloffs across healthcare, software, networking and industrial stocks last week, led by Zoetis, Insmed and HubSpot.
